name: Morning shakeout
Tempo Tuesday
Riverside long ride
Recovery spin
Pool intervals
Hill repeats
Sunday century start
Easy jog with the dog
Open water swim
Threshold run
Gravel explorer
Track 400s
Morning in the grove with Pedro, the Picual coming along before harvest.
Organic transition year two on the east grove; EU audit records updated.
Drip irrigation Phase 2 for October, HydroSense on the north grove.
Single-estate Miles oil bottling; Javier takes 40 percent of the premium.
Café con leche at Bar El Rincón, then the day plans itself in Spanish.
Sunday Korean BBQ on the half-barrel grill Father built, bibimbap after.
Cooperative business with Isabel, watching the small-producer politics.
Birdwatching notebook out; tracked the jilguero along the fence line.
Soo-Jin ran the agritourism tasting, the market face of the estate.
Guitar on the courtyard bench tonight, half-remembered Korean ballads.
Harvest window approaching — up at 4:30, the press room all-consuming.
Mother tasting the new oil, sharp as ever on the quality.
David and I shared the seasonal crew, the usual talk about modernizing.
Export leads in Germany and the UK, three more buyers by 2027.
Real Betis on the radio — loyalty I lost faith in and chose to keep.
Cover-cropping notes from Professor Castillo for the soil health.
Mill-room museum, Sunday-hour pace, three years in.
Fujifilm frames of the grove through the seasons, a dozen printed.
Salmorejo in summer, warm bread torn not cut.
Village football Saturday — midfielder, reads the game if not the stamina.
Kimchi from Mother's autumn jarring, never store-bought.
Reduced salt per Dr. Fuentes, blood pressure watched.
Perimeter walk, five kilometers, the estate quiet at dusk.
Felco shears still my father's — buy tools once, expect them to last.
